task_completion.description: Open the raw manuscript in Apache OpenOffice Writer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Apache OpenOffice Writer is open and displays the manuscript text.

task_completion.description: Configure the page size to 6.00" x 9.00"
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Style dialog shows Format/Width as 6.00" and Height as 9.00", or the horizontal and vertical rulers reflect these dimensions.

task_completion.description: Configure mirrored margins with specific dimensions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Style dialog shows Page Layout set to 'Mirrored' with Inner: 0.80", Outer: 0.50", Top: 0.75", and Bottom: 0.75".

task_completion.description: Apply justified alignment, 0.25" first-line indent, and zero paragraph spacing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Paragraph dialog shows Alignment: Justified, Indent First line: 0.25", and Spacing Above/Below: 0.00", or the document text visually reflects these settings.

task_completion.description: Configure alternating headers with author name and book title
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Style dialog shows Header enabled with 'Same content left/right' unchecked, AND/OR visual confirmation of 'J.R. BLACKWOOD' centered on an even page and 'THE ECHOING VOID' centered on an odd page.

task_completion.description: Include centered page numbers in the footer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The footer area at the bottom of the page contains a centered page number.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as The_Echoing_Void_Formatted.odt
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title bar displays 'The_Echoing_Void_Formatted.odt' or a Save As dialog is visible with this filename and the correct path.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenOffice Writer menus, dialogs (Page Style, Paragraph), and toolbars, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with Apache OpenOffice Writer
integrity.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer interface (toolbars, icons, window frame) is clearly visible, not a basic text editor or a different word processor.

integrity.description: The document contains the actual manuscript text
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the document resembles a science fiction story (Chapter 1 intro), not dummy text, lorem ipsum, or pasted instructions from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/The_Echoing_Void_Formatted.odt'. The page size must be exactly 6.00 inches wide by 9.00 inches high. Margins must be mirrored: 0.80 inches inside (gutter) and 0.50 inches outside. Paragraphs must have a 0.25 inch first-line indent. Even page headers must contain 'J.R. BLACKWOOD' and odd page headers must contain 'THE ECHOING VOID'.
